    def get_connected_device():
        """연결된 Android 기기의 UDID를 자동으로 가져옴"""
        result = subprocess.run(
            ["adb", "devices"],
            capture_output=True,
            text=True
        )
    
        lines = result.stdout.strip().split("\n")[1:]  # 첫 줄(헤더) 제외
        devices = [line.split("\t")[0] for line in lines if "\tdevice" in line]
    
        if not devices:
